case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP VS. LOUIS GRIFFIN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, LOUIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
